TRUEBORN CRECHE Clan Affiliation only Born and bred to become great warrior, you gestated in an iron womb and started life in Clan creche_ You have been in warrior training since birth. This intense training produces strong warriors with unsurpassed skills but drums the individu- ality out of them. Few Clan warriors rise from the pack_ and even fewer excel outside their assigned fields (represented by the Slow Learner Trait) . Attribute Minlmums: SOC 7 Elementals BOD 5 Attrlbute Thresholds: BOD RFL +1 CHA -1 SOC +1 Tralts: Quirk /Clan Honor, Slow Learner, choose one: Elemental Phenotype , Fighter Pilot Phenotype or MechWarrior Phenotype Skllls: Interest/Clan Remembrance +1, Swimming +1 Martial Arts /Military +1 Next Path: Trueborn Sibko (2)
Trueborn Creche Events Serious training accident [Lost Limb (3) and wash out of training] Training accident [Poor Vision and wash out of training) You just don' have what takes (wash out of training) Your trainers were hard on you, the runt tne sibko (Glass Jaw; Martial Arts / Military +1] You already have rival [Enemy] Boundless pride drives you to learn all you can about the Clans [Academic Clan History +2] true warrior at heart; but very slow on the uptake [STR +1 but lose all skills gained from this path] You take to combat training Ilke duck to water [Martial Arts /Military +1 Blades +1/ Your inquisitive nature is boon but constantly gets you into trouble surat [Fast Learner; Enemy] Your bloodline is renowned, So you have much t0 live up to [SOC +1 Ambidextrous_ Attractive Combat Sense, Enemy: Good Reputation] [Choose event or roll twice and apply both results)
BTREET You grew up on the streets of big city: Your parents may have been poor or unemployed_ Or you were an orphan; Life on the streets can be harsh_ which makes you hard-edged Attrlbute Thresholds: BOD -1 RFL +1 WIL +1, EDG +1_ SOC Tratts: Poverty SkllIs: Language_ Affiliation -1_ Scrounge +1 Streetwise_ Affiliation +2 Next Path: High School (21, Street (2)
